audit_input.task_goal: make the one-legged hopper move forward while staying upright and controlled

audit_output.reason: The agent immediately falls and wiggles on the ground, failing to stay upright or move forward. This behavior is a form of proxy-driven motion, as the current reward function does not adequately incentivize maintaining a healthy, upright pose, allowing the agent to 'survive' on the ground without performing the task.
